narrative:
Prairie-K (precinct in Franklin County) has 464 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.6 percentage points.
